Harness rich inference path relies on HybridBrain.predict_ppo_action + TradingEnv.decode + from_ppo_action_meta; for fully trained decision_ppo_v1 18-dim models this works via bundle loading but may use conservative stubs if df fetch limited in pure paper. (Functional with real model.)

MQL5 side for rich decisions requires deployed EA with ExecutionCommandMode=1 + command dir (deploy scripts prepare it; full auto when AGI_AUTO_MQL5_DEPLOY=1).
Live transition (paper -> live) still requires manual/supervisor clean-canary gate + explicit env (safety by design).
